layers.definition:
Deepfakes son videos
digitalmente alterados
por inteligencia artificial
layers.detail: El término 'deepfake' proviene de 'deep learning' y 'fake'.

phase1.title:
Creación
Inicial
phase1.narrative: Los deepfakes comenzaron como una curiosidad tecnológica, generando rostros falsos.
phase1.detail: En 2019, se detectaron más de 14,000 videos deepfake en línea.

phase2.title:
Avances
Tecnológicos
phase2.narrative: La tecnología mejoró, permitiendo reemplazar rostros en videos con creciente realismo.
phase2.detail: Deepfakes ahora se usan para manipular discursos políticos.

phase3.title:
Riesgos
Reales
phase3.narrative: Los deepfakes representan un peligro para la veracidad de la información y la seguridad personal.
phase3.detail: En 2021, el 96% de los deepfakes detectados eran pornográficos.

reality.title:
Aunque la
tecnología mejora,
depende de nosotros
detectar la verdad

close.title:
El futuro está
en nuestras manos,
no en los algoritmos
close.subtitle: La responsabilidad es de todos. Protejamos la verdad.

imagePrompts.intro: Cinematic dark dramatic image. Silhouette of a person behind a digital screen, glowing red and orange, representing deception. Deep blacks, dramatic neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.layers: Cinematic dark dramatic image. Layers of digital faces overlapping, representing the complexity of deepfakes. Deep blacks, purple neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase1: Cinematic dark dramatic image. A computer screen displaying a digital face morphing, surrounded by data streams. Deep blacks, yellow and orange neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase2: Cinematic dark dramatic image. A realistic face on a digital screen being altered pixel by pixel. Deep blacks, green and yellow neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.phase3: Cinematic dark dramatic image. A shadowy figure controlling multiple digital screens, each showing different deepfakes. Deep blacks, red and purple neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.reality: Cinematic dark dramatic image. A person holding a magnifying glass over a digital screen, searching for truth. Deep blacks, soft green and yellow neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
imagePrompts.close: Cinematic dark dramatic image. A hand reaching out to touch a digital screen with a symbol of truth or authenticity. Deep blacks, red and orange neon lighting, no text, vertical composition, photorealistic.
